title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 376.819 - MO HealthNet division to have right to payment for health care services provided
text:
376.819.  MO HealthNet division to have right to payment for health care services provided. — To the extent that payment has been made by the MO HealthNet division for health care items or services furnished to a Medicaid-eligible individual, the MO HealthNet division is considered to have acquired the rights of the Medicaid-eligible individual to payment by any insurer or other party obligated to cover such health care items or services.
(L. 1994 H.B. 1491 & 1134 merged with S.B. 508, A.L. 2014 H.B. 1299 Revision) 
Subrogation rights of department of social services, liens, recovery of medical expenses, 208.215
